name: Country Style Venison Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bacon into 1-inch cubes and sauté in a large saucepan until lightly browned. Remove and set aside.
2. Cut venison into 1-1/2 or 2-inch pieces and brown over high heat in 4 tablespoons bacon drippings. Stir in flour. Lower the heat and let it brown for 2-3 minutes, stirring several times.
3. Add liquid and simmer until the venison becomes tender, adding more liquid as necessary. This may take 1 hour or longer.
4. Add all other ingredients, except peas, and continue to simmer to make a thick stew.
5. Simmer peas in a separate pan until they are done.
6. Strain the stew and spoon it over or around the dish when serving. Great with buttered corn muffins and a salad.
